message:
Apply rustfmt and clippy cleanups to scenario composer contract

Formatting and idiom fixes applied by rustfmt and clippy to the
scenario composer contract code introduced in 1ce23893:

Formatting:
- Collapse single-expression format! strings that were unnecessarily
  split across multiple lines (Outputtable impl, validation errors,
  operator_action strings, description fields)
- Reflow multi-line method chains (.unwrap_or, .collect::<Vec<_>>())
  to follow standard rustfmt line-width rules
- Normalize array-of-required-fields formatting in validation loop

Clippy:
- Replace "".to_string() with String::new() in test fixtures (6 sites)
  to satisfy clippy::manual_string_new

Test fix:
- Add max_concurrent_runs = 1 to queue overflow test to ensure the
  test contract is internally consistent (max_concurrent_runs must
  not exceed max_queue_depth)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
